stemHtml: An aircraft is to carry a wild animal and has four small cargo bays available for an animal cage. The caged animal has a mass of 102.25 kg. Before loading the caged animal, the aircraft had an initial take-off mass of 6850 kg and a CG positioned 10.2 m aft of the datum. To displace the CG to 10.3 m aft of datum, in which cargo bay position must the animal be loaded?
